news.t: Invesco Advances Its Fixed Income ETF Lineup with Launch of Four New Funds

overview.description: The Invesco U.S. Hybrid Bond ETF (HBRD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted index of USD-denominated hybrid corporate debt issued in the US. Hybrid corporate bonds have both debt and equity features. HBRD was launched on Feb 25, 2026 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: ICE USD Developed Markets Corporate Ex-Banks Hybrid Bond 4.85% Constrained Index

data.title: Invesco Advances Its Fixed Income ETF Lineup with Launch of Four New Funds
data.text: New ETFs deepen Invesco's fixed income lineup, supporting a comprehensive, diversified suite built to meet evolving investor needs. ATLANTA, Feb. 25, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd.
